title: Islamabad Talks Fail, JD Vance Says "Iran Chose Not To Accept Our Terms"
summary_full: JD Vance said that over 21 hours of negotiations, Iran chose not to accept US' terms.
summary_public: JD Vance said that over 21 hours of negotiations, Iran chose not to accept US' terms.

IR.label: negative
